user.title: Set up Bedtime Stories
user.description: Create a story library. Categories and stories are managed later, directly in the dashboard card editor.

data_description.players: Players offered by the player select entity (e.g. the kid's room speaker and your phone). Leave empty to always pick the player in the card.
Players offered by the player select entity.

play.name: Play story
play.description: Plays a story from the library on a media player and records it in the play statistics.

story_id.name: Story
story_id.description: ID of the story (shown in the card editor).

media_player.name: Media player
media_player.description: Overrides the player selected in the player select entity.

config_entry_id.name: Library
config_entry_id.description: Only needed when several Bedtime Stories libraries exist.
